title: Mini Quests
description: Turn everyday items into exciting rewards with a simple GUI quest system press H to begin your adventure!
body:
Mini Quests is a lightweight, engaging mod that adds a simple but rewarding quest mechanic to your gameplay. Designed for players who enjoy small goals and steady progression, this mod introduces a fully functional quest system that’s easy to use and fun to explore.

Press H at any time to open the Mini Quests GUI. Within the interface, you’ll find a slot where you can submit a required item. Each quest asks for a single item, often something relatively common or themed around different aspects of the game (like food, ores, or mob drops). Once submitted, the item is consumed, and you instantly receive a random reward item which can range from useful tools, rare resources, enchanted gear, or even decorative surprises.

After each quest is completed, the mod automatically generates a new random item requirement for the next quest, keeping the loop fresh and unpredictable. There’s no quest log, no clutter just a fast and fun give and take mechanic that fits smoothly into any playstyle or modpack.

Whether you’re farming, mining, fishing, or just exploring, Mini Quests gives you a reason to interact with your inventory in a new way turning ordinary items into exciting surprises.
